commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Sin reigned when it saw that it was driving sinners into death, in which it rejoiced, in much the same way as grace will reign in those who obey God. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
"reigned unto death, even so might grace reign through righteousness unto (eternal) life by Jesus Christ".
By a figure we die in our baptism, but in a reality we rise again in the flesh, even as Christ did, "that, as sin has reigned in death, so also grace might reign through righteousness unto life eternal, through Jesus Christ our Lord."
